steps.title: Evaluate at one
steps.content: The value $k$ means $f(1)$. In Desmos, make one table row with $x_1=[1]$, then evaluate each answer choice at that same input. Since the choices are equivalent forms, they should all output the same value; the goal is to find which one displays that value as the coefficient or base.

steps.title: Find the zero exponent
steps.content:
The coefficient shows $f(1)$ directly when the exponential factor becomes $1$. In the form
$$
98(1.4)^{x-1}
$$
substituting $x=1$ makes the exponent $0$, so the coefficient is the value of $k$.

steps.title: Choose the displayed value
steps.content: The form with exponent $x-1$ displays $f(1)$ as the coefficient. The answer is C.
